properties.sourceTitle: Severe Weather Warning for DAMAGING WINDS
properties.name: Severe Weather Warning for DAMAGING WINDS
properties.webHeadline:
Locally DAMAGING WINDS averaging 60 to 70 km/h with peak gusts of around 90 km/h are likely about the northeastern ranges over elevated areas above 1200 metres.

Winds are forecast to ease during Tuesday afternoon.


A separate warning for ABNORMALLY HIGH TIDES is also current for parts of the coast....
